review: It's a really helpful website with a cool UI and very easy to use. Adding a feedback option in the menu bar would make it even more useful for everyone!
Love how easy it is to track my impact. The comparison feature shows me how I'm doing versus others. Really eye-opening!
Beautiful design meets real environmental impact tracking!
Simple, elegant, and surprisingly addictive. Nicely done!

The weather and climate API integration is super useful, and tracking my environmental impact has never been this engaging. Improving cross-platform support and optimization would make it even better!
